The fact that several players suspect Mike as a troublemaker suggests that he was probably the suspect whose actions would place him in the Werewolf team, especially given that troublemaker swaps can leave a wolf unidentifiable but his behaviour aligns with typical werewolf deceit. Thus voting for Mike lends the greatest chance to remove a potential werewolf.
